name: opl-meta-agent
description: Codex plugin shell for the OPL Meta Agent Foundry Agent.

interface.shortDescription: Foundry Agent for building OPL-compatible domain agents.
interface.longDescription: Adds a thin Codex plugin entry for OPL Meta Agent while keeping generic runtime, Agent Lab, queue, generated interfaces, and promotion gates owned by OPL Framework.
defaultPrompt: Use OPL Meta Agent to turn this high-value knowledge workflow into an OPL-compatible Foundry Agent.
Inspect the target agent requirements and build a staged OPL-compatible domain pack.
Convert this blocked Agent Lab suite into a gated improvement work order without writing target domain truth.
